task: Write a Python function that extracts the AWS region from an S3 bucket URL like 's3://my-bucket.s3.us-west-2.amazonaws.com/key'
Create a JSON object that represents an AWS IAM policy allowing read-only access to a specific S3 bucket named 'my-data-bucket'
Write a regex pattern that matches valid AWS EC2 instance IDs in the format 'i-' followed by 17 hexadecimal characters
